metadata.name: Gravestorm — Follow the Bodies creates 2 copies after 2 creatures die
metadata.description: Tests the Gravestorm mechanic (CR 702.69a) using Follow the Bodies ({2}{U} Sorcery, Gravestorm, Investigate). Setup: p1 has Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic on the battlefield. First, p1 casts Wrath of God ({2}{W}{W}), which destroys both creatures, incrementing permanents_put_into_graveyard_this_turn to 2. Then p1 casts Follow the Bodies ({2}{U}). The Gravestorm trigger fires, capturing count=2 and placing GravestormTrigger on the stack above the original. Both players pass priority; GravestormTrigger resolves, creating 2 copies of Follow the Bodies on the stack. Stack now holds [Original, Copy1, Copy2]. Each of the 3 instances resolves in LIFO order, each executing Investigate (creating a Clue artifact token). Result: 3 Clue tokens on p1's battlefield. CR 702.69a: 'When you cast this spell, copy it for each permanent put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn.'
metadata.generation_notes: Gravestorm (CR 702.69a) is a triggered ability that fires when the spell is cast. The count is captured at trigger-creation time from permanents_put_into_graveyard_this_turn. Because the schema has no field to pre-set that counter, we use Wrath of God in the first step to kill 2 creatures (Llanowar Elves + Elvish Mystic), raising the counter to 2 before Follow the Bodies is cast. This lets GravestormTrigger capture count=2 and create 2 copies. All 3 instances (2 copies + 1 original) resolve via separate priority rounds, each executing Effect::Investigate{count:Fixed(1)} to create 1 Clue token. Total: 3 Clue tokens. Copies are not cast (CR 707.10) so they do not re-trigger Gravestorm. Follow the Bodies card definition: cid 'follow-the-bodies', Gravestorm keyword + Spell{Investigate{Fixed(1)}}. Wrath of God cost: {2}{W}{W}; Follow the Bodies cost: {2}{U}. Mana in pool: 4 colorless + 2 white + 1 blue to cover both spells sequentially (Wrath pool is consumed, then Follow the Bodies uses remaining colorless+blue).

script.step_note: Step 1: p1 casts Wrath of God to kill both creatures, raising permanents_put_into_graveyard_this_turn to 2.

actions.description: Initial: 2 creatures on battlefield, p1 hand has Wrath of God + Follow the Bodies, stack empty
actions.note: p1 has {4}{WW}{U} in pool. 2 creatures on battlefield will die to Wrath of God, incrementing permanents_put_into_graveyard_this_turn from 0 to 2.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Wrath of God {2}{W}{W}. Costs 2 colorless + 2 white from pool.

actions.description: After casting Wrath of God: stack has 1 spell, hand has 1 card (Follow the Bodies)
actions.note: Wrath of God is on the stack. Follow the Bodies remains in hand.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority. Wrath of God resolves.

resolution.note: CR 701.7a: Wrath of God destroys all creatures. Both Llanowar Elves and Elvish Mystic are destroyed and move to p1's graveyard. permanents_put_into_graveyard_this_turn increments to 2.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Wrath of God resolves. Both creatures destroyed. SBAs confirm lethal damage / destroy effect.

results.description: Llanowar Elves destroyed by Wrath of God
Elvish Mystic destroyed by Wrath of God

actions.note: SBAs fire: both creatures move to graveyard. permanents_put_into_graveyard_this_turn = 2.

actions.description: After Wrath resolves: battlefield empty, both creatures in graveyard, stack empty
actions.note: Both permanents put into graveyard this turn. Counter is now 2 for Gravestorm.

script.step_note: Step 2: p1 casts Follow the Bodies. Gravestorm fires with count=2, placing GravestormTrigger on stack.

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Follow the Bodies {2}{U}. Gravestorm trigger fires immediately at cast time (CR 702.69a), capturing count=2. GravestormTrigger placed on stack above the original.

actions.description: After casting Follow the Bodies: stack has 2 objects (Follow the Bodies + GravestormTrigger)
actions.note: CR 702.69a: GravestormTrigger fires when Follow the Bodies is cast. Stack = [Follow the Bodies (bottom), GravestormTrigger (top)].
CR 116.3: Both pass. GravestormTrigger (top of stack) resolves, creating 2 copies of Follow the Bodies.

resolution.note: CR 702.69a: GravestormTrigger resolves, creating 2 copies of Follow the Bodies on the stack. Copies are not cast (CR 707.10) and do not re-trigger Gravestorm.

actions.note: Trigger resolves. Stack now has [Original (bottom), Copy1, Copy2 (top)].

actions.description: After GravestormTrigger resolves: stack has 3 objects (Original + 2 copies)
actions.note: CR 405.5: LIFO order. Stack = [Original, Copy1, Copy2]. Priority returns to p1.

script.step_note: Step 3: Resolve all 3 instances of Follow the Bodies (LIFO order). Each Investigates, creating 1 Clue token.

actions.note: CR 116.3: Both pass. Copy2 (top of stack) resolves — Investigates, creating 1 Clue token.

resolution.note: CR 701.16a: Investigate creates 1 Clue artifact token. Copy2 is not cast (CR 707.10).

actions.note: Copy2 resolves. 1 Clue token created. Stack = [Original, Copy1].

actions.description: After Copy2 resolves: 1 Clue token on battlefield
actions.note: 1 Clue token from Copy2. Stack still has Original + Copy1.
CR 116.3: Both pass. Copy1 (top of stack) resolves — Investigates, creating 1 more Clue token.

resolution.note: CR 701.16a: Investigate creates 1 Clue artifact token. Copy1 resolves.

actions.note: Copy1 resolves. 2 Clue tokens total on battlefield. Stack = [Original].

actions.description: After Copy1 resolves: 2 Clue tokens on battlefield
actions.note: 2 Clue tokens from Copy2 + Copy1. Only Original remains on stack.
CR 116.3: Both pass. Original Follow the Bodies resolves — Investigates, creating 1 more Clue token. Spell moves to graveyard (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 701.16a: Original Follow the Bodies resolves. Investigate creates 1 Clue token. Spell goes to graveyard.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Original resolves. 3 Clue tokens total. Follow the Bodies moves to graveyard.

actions.description: Final: 3 Clue tokens on p1 battlefield, stack empty, Follow the Bodies in graveyard
actions.note: CR 702.69a: Gravestorm count=2 → GravestormTrigger created 2 copies + 1 original = 3 total Investigate effects = 3 Clue tokens. Follow the Bodies is in p1 graveyard. Clue tokens are 0/0 artifact tokens.
